TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tr·∫ßn_ƒê·∫°i_Quang, title = Tr·∫ßn_ƒê·∫°i_Quang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tr·∫ßn_ƒê·∫°i_Quang} }

S.FORM: Tr·∫ßn ƒê·∫°i Quang I 1956 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tr·∫ßn ƒê·∫°i Quang, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Vietnam anini i ci Tr·∫ßn ƒê·∫°i Quang, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 2 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: tr*n **i *o~u~ua≈ã i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i tr*n **i *o~u~ua≈ã, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~vi…ôtnam anini i ¶i tr*n **i *o~u~ua≈ã, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: Tr·∫ßn ƒê·∫°i Quang I 1956 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tr·∫ßn ƒê·∫°i Quang, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Vietnam anini i ci Tr·∫ßn ƒê·∫°i Quang, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 2 a romi'ad.
